baseline.method: Use the recorded simpler comparison path rather than the structural product path.
baseline.name: plausible narrative completion
baseline.result: Infer missing ambient activity from nearby transcript text.

claim.scope: the current Polylogue archive tiers at the recorded revision
claim.statement: Minute-by-minute fusion of transcript, window-focus, shell-history, and browser-tab evidence is not supported by this Polylogue schema.

missing_evidence.expected: No matching ambient source table must produce a refusal, not an empty successful timeline.
missing_evidence.purpose: Require missing evidence to remain explicit rather than converted into a positive claim.

negative.expected: Existing session-to-repository and session-to-commit rows must not be mislabeled as minute-level ambient evidence.
negative.purpose: Prevent an adjacent easier signal from being counted as the primary construct.

falsifier.condition: A current archive-tier table is found that stores minute-grained window-focus, independent shell-history, and browser-tab observations.
falsifier.evaluation_method: Apply the stated condition to the committed evidence and run log.

non_claims: This refusal does not claim that cross-source reconstruction is impossible in a federated Sinex-backed architecture.
This packet does not measure production source coverage or the quality of any external activity system.

oracle.description: The archive DDL independently determines which source domains can exist in Polylogue.
oracle.method: Inspect every archive-tier CREATE TABLE declaration for the required ambient source domains.

primary_construct.statement: The product refuses a cross-source reconstruction when required source domains are absent.

provenance.sample_frame_predicate: all Polylogue archive-tier DDL files at the recorded revision

receipts.description: Committed evidence rows and references for this packet.
The committed prompt that states the packet claim before execution.

reproduction.fixture: current archive-tier DDL and deterministic demo seed

results.summary: The claim is refused on structural schema grounds and the narrower existing correlations are named.

title: Multi-source reconstruction refusal
